title: Golub Capital Expands CLO Business To Europe, Appoints New Managing Director
author: Caroline Ryan
description: Golub Capital announced the expansion of its Broadly Syndicated Loan (BSL) CLO strategy to Europe, appointing Tyler Wallace as managing director to lead the initiative. The expansion aims to meet growing demand from European partners and leverages the firm's successful U.S. CLO platform. As of December 31, 2025, Golub Capital managed over $14 billion in broadly syndicated loans and achieved record securitizations of $24.4 billion in 2025, maintaining its position as the No. 1 U.S. CLO manager.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is expanding its CLO business to Europe with record performance metrics, including $24.4 billion in securitizations in 2025, maintaining its position as the No. 1 U.S. CLO manager. The appointment of an experienced managing director and strong European track record ($3.2 billion in new commitments in 2025) indicate growth and strategic expansion.
SPY is mentioned only in a promotional bullet point unrelated to the main article content about Golub Capital's expansion. No substantive information or sentiment drivers are provided.

title: BDCs: An Overlooked but High-Paying Income Investment
author: Dave Gilreath
description: Business development companies (BDCs) are financial firms that provide capital loans to small, private companies. Many public BDCs offer high dividend yields of around 10%, making them an attractive income investment option for investors.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article highlights Ares Capital Corporation as a large public BDC with a market cap of $12.8 billion and an annual dividend yield of 9.16%, making it an attractive high-yield investment option.
Golub Capital BDC Inc is highlighted as a large public BDC with a market cap of $4.07 billion and an annual dividend yield of 10.1%, making it an attractive high-yield investment option.
The article mentions Barings BDC as a public BDC with a market cap of $1.07 billion and an annual dividend yield of 10.26%, making it a high-yielding investment option.
The article highlights the VanEck BDC Income ETF as the largest BDC ETF with $1.2 billion in assets, providing investors with exposure to the BDC sector.
The Putnam BDC Income ETF is mentioned as the second-largest BDC ETF with $91.7 million in assets, offering investors another option to gain exposure to the BDC sector.

title: Morgan Stanley Direct Lending Fund (MSDL) Soars 5.4%: Is Further Upside Left in the Stock?

description: Morgan Stanley Direct Lending Fund (MSDL) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might not help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.
